field_values.action_summary: Following the airship battle, Carter spends several days training with the "thoats." While Tharks use brute strength, Carter uses a mix of authority and kindness. His success is so profound that he teaches Tars Tarkas and other warriors his methods, transforming the beasts into docile mounts.
field_values.camera_intent: Wide shots of beasts and riders; Close-ups of hands and facial expressions; Medium shots of Tars Tarkas observing; Low-angle shots of thoats
field_values.end_state: scene resolves into the next narrative beat
movement_notes: Physical behavior shift of thoats from wild to docile
Specific hand/body movements used in taming process
field_values.transition_notes:
# Scene Contract: CH013_SC001

## Production Intent
Demonstrate John Carter's specialized skill of mastering Martian beasts through empathy and authority rather than brute force. The sequence must visually transition from aggressive, wild animal behavior to calm, docile cooperation to validate his unique methodology.

## Required Cast
- john_carter
- tars_tarkas
- green_martian_warriors

## Required Environments
- green_martian_city_complex (training_arena, warrior_observation_deck)

## Continuity Constraints
- Physical behavior shift of thoats from wild to docile
- Carter's training attire consistency
- Specific hand/body movements used in taming process

## Beat List
- BT001: Chaos of the wild thoats
- BT002: The taming process (empathy vs force)
- BT003: Teaching the warriors and Tars Tarkas
field_values.dialogue_relevance: dialogue supports scene intent and continuity
